# DIMES IDMS

> Integrated Data Management System for humanitarian and MEAL organizations — harmonize field, partner, and donor data; track KPIs; map interventions; collect offline with Dimes Collect.

DIMES IDMS helps NGOs and MEAL teams stop spending weeks consolidating scattered spreadsheets and survey exports. The platform standardizes, validates, and analyzes program data in one workspace with role-based access and audit trails.

## Key pages

- Home: /
- Features: /features
- Pricing: /pricing (see also /pricing.md for structured tiers)
- About: /about
- Support: /support
- Contact: /contact
- Sign up: /signup

## Product highlights

- Unified data harmonization across Excel, CSV, KoboToolbox, ODK, and APIs
- KPI analytics linked to organizational goals and projects
- Spatial analytics and mapping
- Built-in FCRM and review/approval workflows
- Dimes Collect: offline-first mobile data collection
- Multi-organization collaboration with data sovereignty controls

## Pricing summary

- Free: $0/month — 2 users, 1 project, core forms/reports, mobile app, email support
- Basic: $150/month — 7 users, 4 projects, priority support
- Professional: $400/month — 20 users, 10 projects, dedicated server, advanced analytics
- Enterprise: $800/month — unlimited users/projects, multi-region, SLA, custom training
